headline: Elkhart Clinic Joins American Oncology Network, Becomes Elkhart Hematology and Oncology
summary: ELKHART, Ind., May 05, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Elkhart Clinic’s hematology and oncology practice has joined American Oncology Network (AON), one of the nation’s fastest-growing networks of community-based oncology practices. The practice, located at 2117 W. Lexington Ave., will now be known as Elkhart Hematology and Oncology. This partnership enables Ahsanul Haque, MD, and Charisse Prall, FNP-BC, to expand patient-focused services, enhance access to clinical trials and pursue new growth opportu
